raw_text: carlos de oro calderon title: materials engineer area of expertise: materials/process optimization, mechanical testing, failure analysis contact: phone: e-mail: +34636470115 carlos90.oroo gmail.com +34916941697 presentation specialist in the optimization of components design, materials and processes for improving the performance of structural parts and systems. highly skilled in failure analysis as well as in the implementation of r&dprojects for optimizing parts & processes and for implementing the use of new materials in specific mechanical components. work experience in airbus commercial programs: a380, a350, a330 and a320 families, as well as in defence and space programs: a400m, eurofighter, cn235 and cn295. experienced working in multi-cultural environments, as well as in projects that involve collaboration with customers and with different departments. very good social and interpersonal skills with high interest in promoting teamwork. quick learner and proactive, always willing to learn and face new challenges. competence e strongest skills: adaptability, interpersonal skills, problem solving. e technical skills: design, testing, customer support, material and processes, lean manufacturing. e generic competencies: creative thinking, continuous learning, trouble shooting, teamwork driving. work experience 2017/11- nowadays assystem iberia, manufacturing engineer at airbus. om airbus a350 section 19. ces "process improvement projects, sols redaction, time management, workshop support, route management. airbus softwares: catia v5, sap.. o 2017/01- 2017/11 airbus trainee at airbus group, material & process technology department and integrated laboratory. lax failure analysis of metallic and composite components based on visual inspection, material characterization, fractographic examination (macro and sem) and jf metallographic studies. new developments, qualifications of materials, specified items, blanks, manufacturing a r b us processes and fpqs. collaboration with internal and external partners in agreement with stress, design, procurement and manufacturing departments. e 2015/08-2016/08 hoganas ab, junior project manager engineer at application development department as junior project manager: optimization of heat treatments applied to structural components. development of new methods for mechanical testing of sintered jj l gears. integrated design of sintered parts in collaboration with part producers and final users. as project engineer: development of advanced joining techniques (sinter-brazing) developed in cooperation with customers. s 2015/08-2016/08 jl e 2015/03-2015/08 2013/02-2013/09 dea hoganas ab, development engineer at materials development department investigation of new materials for optimizing the performance of sintered components: design of new materials based on the use of computational tools (thermocalc, jmatpro). optimization of processing parameters. evaluation of performance using mechanical testing (tensile, impact energy, hardness, micro- hardness, three point bending and fatigue tests) and microstructural evaluation (optical microscopy, scanning electron microscopy-sem, fracture analysis). patent application ongoing. hoganas ab, master thesis worker at material development department master thesis on influence of boron as a microalloying element to be used in sintered structural components. research institute imdea energy, intership as materials engineer. -design and testing of thermal sensors used in tunnels. -deposition of semiconductive oxide layers on insulating substrates -development of materials for electrodes in supercapacitors used in capacitive deionization education 2016- 2017 master in professional development (currently ongoing) 2009-2015 materials engineering, universidad rey juan carlos de madrid strong background in physics and chemistry, mechanical properties, design, processing, degradation and corrosion of materials, failure analysis, ceramics, polymers, metals and composite materials. 2015-2016 continuing training / courses 2015 thermocalc, hóganás ab, continuous training during the master thesis. 2015 heat treatments, hóganás ab, 3 days. 2015 metallography school, hóganás ab, 4 days. 2015 internal powder metal school, hóganás ab, 5 days. languages english fluent in speaking and writing swedish beginner
